meta.corpus: Stripe tutorial corpus (scripts/stripe_corpus.json), 11 tutorials / 317 steps indexed
meta.scoring: Each query's top-3 retrieved steps reviewed by hand against query intent (PASS/PARTIAL/MISS).
meta.note: The index also contained a few non-Stripe tutorials (Claude Code) and two test entries; this is realistic contamination and is reflected in the misses.

scores.query: How do I find my API keys?
Where do I get my publishable and secret keys?
How do I set up a webhook endpoint?
My webhook events aren't arriving — how do I debug?
How do I verify webhook signatures?
How do I create a subscription plan?
scores.note: Corpus has payment-link product/subscription steps, not 'create a subscription plan'; landed in the right area.

scores.query: How do I cancel a customer's subscription?
scores.note: A cancel-capable step exists (Webhooks step 29: update/pause/cancel) but was not ranked top-3 for this phrasing.

scores.query: How do I pause a subscription without cancelling it?
How do I issue a refund to a customer?
scores.note: No refund content in the corpus; retrieval returned no steps.

scores.query: A customer was charged twice — what do I do?
scores.note: No duplicate-charge/refund content in the corpus.

scores.query: How do I test payments without real card details?
What test card numbers can I use?
When will my payout arrive?
scores.note: Right payouts video, but the corpus covers schedule config, not payout arrival timing.

scores.query: How do I change my payout bank account?
scores.note: Right payouts video; corpus lacks a dedicated 'change bank account' step (only mentioned during activation).

scores.query: How do I set up a payment link for my product?
Can I accept payments without a website?
scores.note: Answerable via Payment Links/Terminal, but the top hit was a generic intro step, not the payment-link creation step.

scores.query: How do I add a new team member to my Stripe account?
scores.note: No team-member/roles content in the corpus; returned sign-in steps.

scores.query: How do I accept Apple Pay and Google Pay?
How do I enable SEPA or BACS bank transfer payments?
scores.note: Landed in the payment-methods video, but the corpus lists Cards/Wallets only — no SEPA/BACS.

scores.query: A payment shows as 'pending' — is this normal?
scores.note: Payments area, but the corpus has no explanation of 'pending' status.

scores.query: How do I integrate Stripe into my website?
How do I create a product and price in Stripe?
My customer's card was declined — what should I tell them?
scores.note: No card-decline handling in the corpus; retrieval returned no steps.

scores.query: How do I switch from test mode to live mode?
How do I download my Stripe invoice or receipt?
scores.note: No invoice/receipt-download content in the corpus.
